title: Kill the Host
tagline: Delete the repo the API lives in; it keeps answering from a fork.
holy_shit: You delete the repository the API lives in, and it keeps answering — because the thing you trust is the content hash, not the host.
powered_by: /resolver (host in one line) + content-addressed sha8 frames
agent_scenario: When you need an endpoint that survives its origin being deleted — resolve+verify the same content from any mirror.
author: kody-w + Claude
